items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta—Color-Block Series BV Loop Camera Bag 💥, the best value for money. Large woven texture + consistently high-quality calfskin. Features a zipper and adjustable drawstring. The 'small belly' is surprisingly spacious 💫, holds everything, and is very lightweight. Suitable for girls of all ages.

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's 2024 Fall/Winter highlight, shining from the runway to the streets. It brings a rich retro vibe and easily creates different styles through versatile combinations. Whether for a professional office look or casual daily wear, the full-grain calfskin is a fashion element you cannot miss!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's new bowling bag: What can it hold? Have you got yours yet? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ The sense of fashion is not reduced at all. Combines BV's classic weaving elements, and a laptop can fit inside. The shoulder strap length is adjustable, suitable for tall girls, and looks sunny on guys ☀️

items.name_en: BottegaVeneta This evening bag (crocodile) is truly cool and beautiful
items.name_cn:
BottegaVeneta This evening bag (crocodile) is truly cool and beautiful
Each color has a different vibe
Andiamo is Bottega's most talked-about model recently
If you are tired of big logo prints, come appreciate the high-end feel of the woven craftsmanship
​Simple structure with rounded lines
A tubular woven design combined with jewelry craftsmanship, featuring a brass muse metal knot buckle that brings together all the classics
​Model: 741511
​Size: 31*13*3

items.name_en: BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
items.name_cn:
BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
Each color has a unique vibe.
Andiamo is Bottega's most talked-about model recently.
If you are tired of the big logo, come appreciate the high-end feel of the woven craftsmanship.
Crafted from Nappa calfskin with fine silk weaving, the leather is incredibly delicate and soft.
Simple structure with rounded lines.
A tubular woven design combined with jewelry craftsmanship features a brass Muse metal rope knot buckle, bringing together all the classics.
Model: 741511
Size: 31*13*3

items.name_en: BV 2024 Fall/Winter New Arrival: Super Unique Wax Leather Tote. Made from soft calfskin, it feels soft and warm. The simple colors are very attractive, and the capacity is amazing; a laptop fits easily. It is unisex, truly a must-have. Cool, chic, and premium. Let it become your most intimate bag this autumn.

items.name_en: BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
items.name_cn:
BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
The inverted triangle metal buckle is stylish and unisex. BV woven bag # seamless body
A treasure bag, the entire handbag is made from a single piece of leather, requiring 20M wadding tubular strips. The body shows no seams, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. The crepe technique calf leather feels amazing, like a squishy BV bag.
High-craftsmanship Rumple Messenger, newly arrived. Adjustable length, shoulder or crossbody is fine. You deserve it!
Style: 776519
Size: 30*23*7.5cm (Strap length 55cm)
